title: Veerame Vaagai Soodum
subTitle: Porus, a strong-minded IPS aspirant from a middle-class family in Chennai, comes across a series of dark secrets while investigating his sister's murder.

title: Siruthai
subTitle: Rocket Raja, a small-time thief, comes across a young girl who calls him father. However, when Raja finds the truth about the girl's past, he turns into a vigilante.

title: Chiriyo Chiri
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of the funniest and most entertaining comedy scenes and videos from various famous Malayalam movies.

title: Kadha Parayumbol
subTitle: Balan, a barber, struggles to give his family a better living. However, his life changes when his old friend, who is a film star, comes to his village for a film shoot.

title: Doctor's Talk
subTitle: Dr.Eeppan, the host, interacts and discusses about various health problems with guest doctors and gives remedial tips for the viewers.

title: Arjun S/O Vyjayanthi
subTitle: Arjun, a gangster, learns that a terrorist wants to take revenge from his mother, who is an IPS officer. In order to protect her, he strives to overcome all the odds.

title: Ratsasan
subTitle: Following his father's death, a man gives up on his dream to become a film-maker and joins the police force. He then attempts to track down a psychopathic killer who targets schoolgirls.

title: Janaki Nayakan
subTitle: Ram, a young boy, lives in a monastery waiting for Sita to return and take care of him. However, Sita returns, years later, but with an ulterior motive.

title: Ultimate Justice
subTitle: Retired special operations soldiers are called back into action when their former commander's daughter is kidnapped by an unknown organisation.

title: Kathakali
subTitle: Amudhavel, a simpleton, gets embroiled in the murder of Thamba, a local gangster. The police think that he is the culprit as he had a conflict with him in the past.

title: Amma Ammaayiyamma
subTitle: Prabhavathy, one of five children, marries a rich businessman, Shekharankutty, and forgets about her family. Her husband decides to make her understand the importance of her family.

title: Arjun S/O Vyjayanthi
subTitle: Arjun, a gangster, learns that a terrorist wants to take revenge from his mother, who is an IPS officer. In order to protect her, he strives to overcome all the odds.

title: Ee Parakkum Thalika
subTitle: Unni, a bus owner, tries several ways to improve the condition of his bus, which is named after his late father. Things take a turn when the daughter of a powerful politician enters his life.

title: Aathi
subTitle: A young boy moves to Chennai for his education where he meets a girl and falls in love with her. Soon, they learn that they are both on a mission to avenge the death of their parents.

title: Aranmanai
subTitle: A family returns to their hometown to sell their ancestral palace. However, their arrival is marred by supernatural events, and Ravi, a relative of the family, decides to uncover the truth.

title: Legendary Amazons
subTitle: In 11th century China, emperor Renzong neglects state affairs and indulges in personal pleasures, while the government sinks into corruption as war rages at the borders of the Song Dynasty.

title: Cobra
subTitle: A genius mathematician uses his skills to assassinate his targets and stay clear of law enforcement. However, a vigilante secretly tracks his movements, vying for revenge.

title: Googly
subTitle: Sharath leads a carefree life until he meets Swathi at a college event. A friendship turns into a mutual attraction, but a small misunderstanding causes them to part ways.

title: Pokkiri Raja
subTitle: Raja takes the blame for a murder committed by his father and is deserted by him. Years later, his father comes seeking his help when his younger brother, Surya, is falsely imprisoned.

title: Singam II
subTitle: Durai Singam, a policeman working an undercover operation, attempts to eliminate a drug trafficking ring in the coastal town of Thoothukudi.

title: Mersal
subTitle: Maaran, a doctor, is falsely arrested for the murder of his colleague, Dr Arjun Zachariah. He soon discovers that the real culprit is a lookalike who aims to expose corruption in the medical industry.

title: Dinoasur Hotel 2
subTitle: Remaining contestants from a deadly game go head-to-head again to win ten million dollars, surviving against desperate players and vicious dinosaurs.

title: Dora
subTitle: A father and daughter purchase an old run-down vintage car. However, unbeknownst to them, the car is possessed by a dangerous revenge-seeking spirit.

title: Biriyani
subTitle: Sugan and Parasuram leave Varadharajan's party drunk in search of a place to have biryani. Soon, they get into some serious trouble when they find a corpse in the trunk of their car.
